OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Show Objective Pulse to Instigator Only
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Show Objective Pulse to Instigator Only

OptionDescription.SourceString: The Objective Pulse will only appear for the player who activated it.  Likewise it will only disappear for the player who activated it.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: The Objective Pulse will only appear for the player who activated it.  Likewise it will only disappear for the player who activated it.
